subcodes.first_line: O ye who gaze toward the Center of the Covenant! Glory be unto God! Through the conclusive Text divine, all, from first to last, after [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظران بمرکز پیمان سبحان الله بنص قاطع الهی کل من البدو الی الختم بعد از
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
